overview: A modern, multi-page website for Sri Sri Institute — an educational coaching centre for government competitive exams. Features a 3D animated hero, course catalog, enquiry form with backend storage, and a password-protected admin dashboard for managing student enquiries.
features: 3D animated hero with React Three Fiber floating shapes and particles
6 full pages: Home, About, Courses, Testimonials, Enquiry, and Contact
Enquiry form with Motoko backend persistence and success confirmation
Password-protected admin dashboard showing all submitted enquiries
Sticky navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Glassmorphic card design with deep blue and gold color theme
Faculty grid and achievements timeline on About page
Five course programs: Banking, SSC, Railways, State Exams, Defence
WhatsApp floating button and back-to-top button on all pages
SEO meta tags and smooth scroll animations
